data.title: Alibaba Launches Upgraded AI Tool, Says Its Better Than What Google And ChatGPT Have To Offer
data.description: The international arm of Alibaba Group Holding Ltd has unveiled an upgraded version of its AI-driven translation tool, which it claims surpasses the offerings of Alphabet Inc.'s subsidiary Google, DeepL, and ChatGPT.

data.title: Coin That Underpins Dogecoin Becomes Market's Biggest Gainer— Litecoin Pops 7% After Filing Of Spot ETF Application
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) topped the biggest gainers list Tuesday after digital asset trading and management firm Canary Capital filed for an exchange-traded fund (ETF) tracking the proof-of-work (PoW) cryptocurrency's price.

data.title: Apple Mini Gets An AI Upgrade 3 Years After Last Facelift — Price Starts At $499
data.description: Apple has unveiled an upgraded iPad Mini, featuring the new A17 Pro chip, faster CPU and GPU, increased storage, and compatibility with the Apple Pencil Pro, marking the first significant update to the device since 2021.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Offloads $1.28M In Jack Dorsey's Block Shares Despite Bitcoin Rally
data.description:
On Tuesday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made significant trades, most notably selling off shares of Block Inc. (NYSE:SQ).



The SQ Trade

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta To Face Lawsuits Over Teen Social Media Addiction: Judge Rejects Dismissal Motions From Reddit, YouTube, And Snapchat In Personal Injury Claims
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. has been ordered to face lawsuits from over 30 U.S. states accusing the company of contributing to teen mental health issues by making its platforms addictive, despite some protections under Section 230.
